planContent:
# 🏗️ Architecture Blueprint ## App Overview A premium iPhone 18 Pro Max product landing page showcasing the device's flagship features through an immersive, high-performance single-page experience. The page delivers a cinematic hero sequence, modular feature grid with macro asset photography, and conversion-optimized call-to-action sections, all built with strict adherence to the provided Stitch design system and dark theme color palette. ## Core Features - **Fixed Navigation Bar**: Logo, section links (Overview, Tech Specs, Compare), and prominent "Buy" button with blur backdrop and smooth transitions - **Hero Section with Animated Headline**: Full-viewport hero with fade-in animation, subheading, dual CTA buttons (Buy Now, Watch Film), and macro photography showcase - **Feature Bento Grid Layout**: Responsive 12-column grid showcasing five distinct feature cards (A18 Pro Chip, 100MP Camera, Zero-Edge Display, Grade 5 Titanium, and hardware showcase) - **Individual Feature Cards**: Each card contains headline, descriptive text, background imagery with hover zoom effects, and layered design elements - **A18 Pro Chip Component**: Large card with animated gradient blur effect and centered chip badge - **100MP Camera System Card**: Image reveal on hover with transform scaling - **Zero-Edge Display Card**: Phone frame illustration with gradient overlay - **Titanium Strength Card**: Full-width dual-content layout with texture imagery overlay - **Hardware Showcase Section**: Dark background section with large "PRO MAX" typography watermark, side-profile device image, and descriptive copy - **CTA Section**: Dual action buttons (Order Now, Compare Models) with pricing callout - **Footer**: Seven-column link structure with Store, Entertainment, Support, and About categories; copyright and legal links; responsive grid collapse - **Image Referrer Policy Compliance**: All images include referrerpolicy="no-referrer" meta tag and attribute to prevent 403 errors from Google CDN - **Responsive Design**: Mobile-first responsive adjustments from 375px to 1440px viewports with stacked single-column layouts on mobile ## UI & Layout Strategy - **Layout Type**: Single-column stacked with CSS Grid bento feature section; full-width hero to footer flow - **Header**: Fixed 12px height navigation bar with semi-transparent dark background (#0e0e0e/60), backdrop blur effect, left logo section (iOS icon + "iPhone 18 Pro Max" text), center navigation links (hidden on mobile), right "Buy" button in primary color - **Main Content Area**: - Hero section (min-height screen) with centered text content, fade-in animation on headline, dual CTA buttons (Buy Now, Watch Film), and 16:9 aspect ratio macro photography showcase below - Feature grid section (py-32) using Tailwind 12-column responsive grid with 6px gap spacing - Immersive hardware showcase section with dark background, centered headline/subheading, and device image with drop shadow - Final CTA section (py-32) with dual buttons and pricing text - **Controls**: - "Buy" button (primary, nav bar): px-4 py-1.5, rounded-full, text-xs, hover opacity-80, active scale-95 - "Buy Now" button (hero): bg-primary, px-8 py-4, rounded-full, text-lg font-bold, hover bg-primary-dim, active scale-95 - "Watch the film" link: text-primary, text-lg, underline hover, flex with play_circle icon - "Order Now" button (CTA): bg-primary, px-12 py-5, rounded-full, text-xl, w-full md:w-auto, active scale-95 - "Compare Models" button (CTA): bg-surface-container, border border-outline-variant/10, px-12 py-5, rounded-full, text-xl, hover bg-surface-container-high - **Footer**: 7-column grid (responsive to 4 on md, 2 on sm) with category headers, link lists, copyright block, and legal links row - **Design System**: Strict Tailwind CSS utility classes; no custom CSS except for Material Symbols Outlined font and body min-height rule; extends custom color palette defined in tailwind.config - **Color Scheme**: - Primary background: #0e0e0e (surface, background) - Secondary dark: #131313 (surface-container-low, footer) - Container: #191919 (surface-container) - Text primary: #e5e5e5 (on-surface) - Text secondary: #ababab (on-surface-variant) - Accent: #c6c6c8 (primary, button backgrounds) - Borders/dividers: #484848 (outline-variant), #262626 (surface-variant) - Subtle accents: #757575 (outline), #1f1f1f (surface-container-high) - **Responsive Strategy**: - Mobile (375px): Single-column layout; navigation links hidden (hidden md:flex); buttons full-width (w-full md:w-auto); text sizes scale down (text-[3.5rem] on mobile becomes text-[5rem] on md, text-[6.5rem] on lg); hero image full-width with padding; grid becomes 1 column (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12) - Desktop (1440px): Multi-column grid with 12-column spans (md:col-span-8, md:col-span-4); navigation links visible; buttons inline; text at full size; feature cards arranged in bento layout - **Animations & UX**: - Hero headline: opacity-0 animate-[fadeIn_1s_ease-out_forwards] (custom fade animation) - Macro asset image: grayscale brightness-75 group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-1000 - Camera card image: group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-700 - Titanium card image: group-hover:scale-125 transition-transform duration-1000 - Button hover effects: hover:opacity-80, hover:bg-primary-dim, hover:scale-105 (camera card) - All buttons active state: active:scale-95 duration-200 - Navigation links: hover:opacity-80 or hover:text-[#e5e5e5] with transition-opacity/colors - Feature cards: overflow-hidden with relative positioning for image layering - **Touch Targets**: All buttons minimum 44px height (py-4 = 16px + padding, py-5 = 20px + padding); links have adequate padding; hover states provide visual feedback - **Accessibility**: - Material Symbols Outlined icons with semantic role (e.g., play_circle for video, apple for logo) - All images have alt text and data-alt attributes describing content - Navigation links are semantic tags with href attributes - Button focus rings via active:scale-95 states (visual feedback); add focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary to all buttons - Section landmarks:
,
,
,
semantic HTML - Heading hierarchy:

for hero,

for section titles - Color contrast: text-on-surface (#e5e5e5) on bg-surface (#0e0e0e) meets WCAG AA - Footer links: clickable text with cursor-pointer class - ARIA labels on icon-only elements: aria-label="Apple" on logo icon ## Data Model & State | Variable | Type | Default | Description | |----------|------|---------|-------------| | currentSection | String | "overview" | Tracks which top nav link is active for styling | | imageHoverState | Object | {} | Tracks hover state for each feature card image (used for group-hover effects) | | scrollPosition | Number | 0 | Current window scroll Y position (for potential parallax or lazy-load optimization) | | isMobileNav | Boolean | window.innerWidth < 768 | Tracks if viewport is mobile to conditionally render nav links | | cartItems | Array | [] | Future e-commerce integration; empty for landing page | | analytics | Object | {} | Stores page view, scroll depth, CTA click events for tracking | - **Persistence Strategy**: No data persistence required for landing page. All state is ephemeral and tied to user interactions (hover, scroll, navigation clicks). Use `window.scrollTo()` and CSS scroll-behavior for smooth navigation. No database calls needed. ## Technical Stack & Libraries - **Required CDNs**: - Tailwind CSS v3 with forms and container-queries plugins: `https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries` - Google Fonts Inter (weights 300–800): `https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap` - Material Symbols Outlined: `https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap` - **Allowed Libraries**: Tailwind CSS only (no external component libraries); Material Symbols for iconography; Google Fonts for typography - **APIs**: None (100% offline, static content) - **Images**: All sourced from Google CDN with referrerpolicy="no-referrer" to comply with CORS policies ## Implementation Steps 1. **Set up HTML structure with doctype and meta tags**: Create ``, add charset UTF-8, viewport meta (width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0), title "iPhone 18 Pro Max", and **critical meta tag `` in `` to prevent 403 errors on Google CDN images**. Add Tailwind CSS CDN script with plugins parameter, Google Fonts Inter and Material Symbols links. 2. **Configure Tailwind dark theme and custom colors**: Insert `
